nodes.name: Phyllastrephus
nodes.summary: Phyllastrephus（Phyllastrephus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联18种鸟类，如Lowland tiny greenbul、Montane tiny greenbul、White-throated greenbul等18种鸟类。

nodes.name: Northern brownbul
nodes.summary: The northern brownbul (Phyllastrephus strepitans) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in eastern Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. The northern brownbul was originally described in the genus Criniger. Alternate names include the East African scrub bulbul and northern brown bulbul. References
